note: delta = proxy (last live Wayback snapshot) minus announced shutdown month; positive = site outlived announcement

sample.source: Own site: 'Hera is shutting down on September first' (2022-08)
Founder tweet via HN: 'Quest (YC S21) shuts down' (2022-03-22)

conclusion: Proxy is biased LATE: websites outlive shutdown announcements (median +3 months in this n=4 sample, one +20-month zombie site). KM lifespans should be read as upper bounds. 2 of 6 documented deaths had no usable Wayback trace (excluded from KM, consistent with the 17/300 exclusion rate).
